items.summary: Definitely one way to market your game

items.title: GTA 6 shipping without discs "feels unfair to studios still backing physical," Lords of the Fallen 2 boss says, and Sony's certainly not helping
items.summary: "Physical delivers far less revenue per unit to developers"

items.title: These Are the Top 5 Best Selling Games on Amazon So Far This Year
items.summary: Nintendo continues to dominate Amazon's 2026 best-seller charts (alongside GTA 6), offering an interesting snapshot into the ongoing physical vs digital debate for gaming.

items.title: GTA 6 developer Rockstar accused of enforcing crunch, weaponising bonus payments, and ignoring a widening gender pay gap
items.summary: As Rockstar employees move to pursue official union recognition following a series of high-profile sackings in 2025, new allegations are emerging related to Rockstar's treatment of its staff. In a new report published by Game Developer , multiple Rockstar developers have accused the company of failing to address gen…

items.title: Surprising no one, GTA 6 is at the top of the PlayStation Store in practically every country in the world
items.summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 is topping the PlayStation Store charts across nearly every regional version of Sony's digital store. Since pre-orders went live on 25th June , the game has shot to the top of the various PS Stores worldwide. Read more

items.title: Modern Warfare 4 Facebook ads want to make sure everyone understands this year's Call of Duty won't be on Xbox Game Pass
items.summary: I know we're all thinking about GTA 6 right now, but chances are Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 - releasing on 23rd October - will be massive, too. Regardless, Xbox and Activision are planning ahead in an attempt to avoid Black Ops 7's stumbles , and it seems the publisher and platform holder are putting effort into…

items.title: GTA 6 developers at Rockstar Games pushing to pursue official union recognition following 2025 sackings: "The union is now stronger than ever"
items.summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 has finally locked its 19th November release date and pre-orders are now open. It should be cause for celebration, but with the lack of a proper physical release and after the firing of employees last year (a move considered to be " union-busting " by former and current staff), Rockstar Games is g…

items.title: "We can't back out now!" Onimusha: Way of the Sword developer laughs off concerns around 2026's packed September release window
items.summary: Onimusha: Way of the Sword is one of many, many games due to launch in the September/October 2026 period in 2026. As developers and publishers flee as far away from GTA 6 black hole as they possibly can , the resultant squeeze in the earlier ( or later ) months is resulting in a veritable feast of triple-A and indie…

items.title: Claims GTA 6 is selling 8 times as many copies on PS5 as Xbox "doesn't represent pre-order data", insists Microsoft
items.summary: Microsoft has refuted claims that its rival system, the PlayStation 5, is outselling the Xbox edition of Grand Theft Auto 6 , claiming that the figure "doesn't represent pre-order data" and insisting "we've had record orders". Read more
